name: Form: Update Field

description.en: Update a field in an existing form.
description.de: Ein Feld eines bestehenden Formulars aktualisieren.

bot: Use this to update a field on a form. Call form-get first to read the current definition, then modify the target field in definition.actions[0].inputs and submit the full updated definition.

inputs.name: Definition
inputs.bot: The full updated warp definition with the target field modified in definition.actions[0].inputs. Keep all other fields intact.
